name: ophis
title: Ophis MCP
description: Agent-facing tools for the Ophis DEX: parse swap intents, fetch best-execution quotes, build bounded signable CoW orders, relay pre-signed orders, and look up fee-rebate tiers. Public, unauthenticated, and keyless: the server never holds keys or signs; build_order pins the order receiver to the owner by default (custom receivers require an explicit unsafe opt-in) and the agent signs locally.

tools.name: parse_intent
tools.description: Plain-English swap request -> structured intent (intent + entities).

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Best-execution quote from the chain's Ophis orderbook.

tools.name: build_order
tools.description: A bounded, ready-to-sign EIP-712 CoW order (receiver pinned to owner; correct per-chain settlement; CIP-75 partner fee).

tools.name: submit_order
tools.description: Relay a pre-signed order to the orderbook.

tools.name: lookup_tier
tools.description: A wallet's fee-rebate tier and live status.

tools.name: list_chains
tools.description: Supported chains with orderbook host and settlement contract.
